name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W213/S213 plug-in hybrid (2.0L 4-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: Four-cylinder PHEV: petrol engine follows Mercedes EU ASSYST (commonly 15,000 km or 12 months when combustion mileage accumulates—display may stretch with EV use).
serviceNotes.dust filter: Cabin dust filter per Mercedes maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Petrol engine air filter at standard ASSYST inspection intervals.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; regen does not remove hygroscopy.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Regen extends pad life; inspections remain mandatory.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Turbo four PHEV: 60,000 km / 48 months EU orientation—verify booklet (M274/M264-era).
serviceNotes.coolant: Engine cooling circuit long-life interval (often near 150,000 km).
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: HV battery/e-drive coolant per supplement—120,000 km is a common major renewal point; use a qualified high-voltage workshop.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 9G-TRONIC hybrid integration: preventive ATF ~60,000 km specialist practice.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary engine coolant exchange ~120,000 km if not yet due for OEM long interval.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection PHEV four: consider ~120,000 km if carbon symptoms appear.
